LanguageData.RNGun_SG8Punisher_Shotgun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.RNGun_SG8Punisher_Shotgun.tools.1.label: stock
LanguageData.RNGun_SG20Halt_Shotgun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.RNGun_SG20Halt_Shotgun.tools.1.label: stock
LanguageData.RNGun_SG225IEBreakerIncendiary_Shotgun.d: The SG-225 Breaker is a fully-automatic shotgun specialized for close-quarters combat. This is the distinctive orange 'Incendiary' model, usually used to denote that it is kept loaded with incendiary ammunition - but it's perfectly capable of firing any other kind of 12-gauge round if need be. It may not have the punch of the Punisher or Halt, but it excels in sweeping away chaff thanks to its large magazine.
